title: BEST FLASH MOB PROPOSAL  |  JUST THE WAY YOU ARE  |  DANNY & NAGHAM  |  BEIRUT, LEBANON
text: [Music] like they're not shining her hair her hair falls perfectly without her trying she's so beautiful let's Allah every day yeah I know I know when I compliment her she won't believe me and it's so it's so sad the paper she don't see what I see but every time she asked me do I look okay when I see you [Music] lips her lips I could kiss them all day and she'd let me her laugh her laugh she hates but I think it's all sexy she's so beautiful and I tell her every day [Music] never ask you to change if perfects what you're searching for then just stay the same so don't even bother asking if you look okay you know when I say [Music] [Music] [Music] it's not a thing would change cause you're amazing just the way you are and when you smile [Applause] [Applause] [Music] you [Music]
